extraction.one_line_summary: DE GENDT Thomas won a 9-rider sprint from the breakaway after GARCÍA CORTINA Iván's solo attack from 35km was caught in the finale.
tactical_patterns: CONTADOR Alberto attacking 10km out to bridge to teammate THEUNS Edward reveals Sky's weakness controlling late tempo attacks.
GARCÍA CORTINA Iván's solo TT-style attack from 35km failed when caught by four chasers, suggesting local breakaway riders overcommit early.
19-rider breakaway gaining 15 minutes shows GC teams completely abdicated stage control before final mountain stages, tactical rest day.

rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: won sprint from 9-rider group after appearing weaker on climbs, reveals superior positioning tactics over raw power
rider_signals.GARCÍA CORTINA Iván: negative: burned matches with 35km solo TT effort only to finish third, poor energy management for local rider
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: neutral: attacked 10km out attempting teammate bridge but Team Sky still controlled finish, showing late aggression without consequence
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: positive: entered top 15 overall from breakaway result, demonstrates ability to gain GC positions when leaders rest
